name: spark-forge
description: Local generative-AI skills for NVIDIA DGX Spark: FLUX.2 image generation and Hunyuan3D image-to-3D via a local ComfyUI, with S3 publishing.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Generate images (FLUX.2) and 3D models (Hunyuan3D image-to-3D) locally on a DGX Spark via ComfyUI; publish results to S3/CloudFront.

plugins.name: setup
plugins.description: Provision the DGX Spark generation stack: setup:cdn stands up the S3 + CloudFront download infrastructure via Terraform (model/Hunyuan3D setup to follow).
